tasks.label: bazel-run
tasks.command: t=$(bazel query --keep_going "kind(cc_binary, rdeps(//..., ${relativeFile}))" 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$t" ] && bazel run $t || echo 'No target found' >&2

windows.command: $f='${relativeFile}'.Replace('\','/'); $q='kind(cc_binary, rdeps(//..., '+$f+'))'; $t=$(bazel query --keep_going $q 2>$null | Select -First 1); if($t){ bazel run $t }else{ Write-Error "No target for $f" }

tasks.label: bazel-build
tasks.command: t=$(bazel query --keep_going "kind(cc_binary, rdeps(//..., ${relativeFile}))" 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$t" ] && bazel build $t || echo 'No target found' >&2

windows.command: $f='${relativeFile}'.Replace('\','/'); $q='kind(cc_binary, rdeps(//..., '+$f+'))'; $t=$(bazel query --keep_going $q 2>$null | Select -First 1); if($t){ bazel build $t }else{ Write-Error "No target for $f" }

tasks.label: bazel-build-debug
tasks.command: rm -rf .vscode/bin && t=$(bazel query --keep_going "kind(cc_binary, rdeps(//..., ${relativeFile}))" 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$t" ]; then bazel build $t && exe=$(bazel cquery $t --output=files 2>/dev/null) && mkdir -p .vscode/bin && cp "$exe" .vscode/bin/debug && rf="${exe}.runfiles"; [ -d "$rf" ] && cp -r "$rf" .vscode/bin/debug.runfiles; echo ">>> Ready: .vscode/bin/debug"; else echo 'No target found' >&2; fi

windows.command: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue .vscode/bin; $f='${relativeFile}'.Replace('\','/'); $q='kind(cc_binary, rdeps(//..., '+$f+'))'; $t=$(bazel query --keep_going $q 2>$null | Select -First 1); if($t){ bazel build $t; $exe=$(bazel cquery $t --output=files 2>$null); $dir='.vscode/bin'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null; Copy-Item $exe "$dir/debug.exe" -Force; $rf=$exe+'.runfiles'; if(Test-Path $rf){ Copy-Item $rf "$dir/debug.exe.runfiles" -Recurse -Force }; Write-Host "`n>>> Ready: $dir/debug.exe`n" }else{ Write-Error "No target for $f" }

tasks.label: bazel-run-debug
tasks.command: t=$(bazel query --keep_going "kind(cc_binary, rdeps(//..., ${relativeFile}))" 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$t" ] && bazel build $t && exe=$(bazel cquery $t --output=files 2>/dev/null) && echo "Running: $exe" && "$exe" || echo 'No target found' >&2

windows.command: $f='${relativeFile}'.Replace('\','/'); $q='kind(cc_binary, rdeps(//..., '+$f+'))'; $t=$(bazel query --keep_going $q 2>$null | Select -First 1); if($t){ bazel build $t; $exe=$(bazel cquery $t --output=files 2>$null); Write-Host "Running: $exe"; & $exe }else{ Write-Error "No target for $f" }
